name: Process Launched from a Shared Folder
notes: This rule triggers when a process is launched from a shared folder.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when the event matches "Process Path" MATCHES '\\\\.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Process Launched from a Shared Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when the event matches "Process Path" MATCHES '\\\\.*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Process Launched from a Shared Folder
Event description: Process Launched from a Shared Folder
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
